stemHtml: Should a State consult an operator about the period of time needed for deportation of inadmissable person?

options.a: Yes, the State should consult an operator to provide necessary amount of time.
options.b: No, the State determines the time frame for the removal, which is binding on the aircraft Operator.
options.c: No, the time frame for the removal is specified in ICAO Annex 9 (Facilitation).
options.d: No, the airport will inform the Operator about the time frame for removal.
